concepts.title: Universal approximation of transformers
concepts.hook: Capacity to express any function; attention enables this.

concepts.hook: Formal connection to kernel machines; interpretability.

concepts.hook: SGD trajectory; why transformers generalize without explicit regularization.

concepts.hook: Rank of softmax output limited; architectural implications.

concepts.hook: Replace softmax with kernel; linear complexity but rank limitation.

concepts.hook: Different heads do different jobs (position, syntax, semantics); interpretability.

concepts.title: Gradient flow in deep transformers
concepts.hook: Layer norm and residuals enable stable gradients.

concepts.title: Exploding/vanishing gradient analysis
concepts.hook: When do gradients blow up or shrink?

concepts.hook: Impact on gradient flow and trainability.
